title: Suki Baby Hug-a-Boo Super Soft Plush Bear with Striped Cotton Bow (Large, Blue)
features: Suki Baby Hug-a-Boo Blue Large bear
Supersoft plush bear wearing a striped cotton bow
description: Product Description Beautiful Supersoft plush large Hug-a-Boo bear from Suki Gifts Baby collection. High quality blue soft plush Hug-a-Boo bear wearing a complimntary striped cotton bow. Approximately 17 inches / 43.2cm tall. Hand wash and air dry. Also available in Pink. Other sizes and options available in the Hug-a-Boo Bear collection. Please remove all tags before giving this to a child. Suki Gifts are an innovative British company, providing high quality gifts and soft toys including Baby, Teddy Bears, Plush toys, Mugs, Piggy Banks and much more. Box Contains 1 x Suki Baby Hug-a-Boo Blue Jumbo bear
